description.en: 🦞 Manage OpenClaw gateway instances - query status, modify ports, restart, verify, create and delete safely with triple confirmation and automatic backup. macOS only.
description.zh: 🦞 管理 OpenClaw 网关实例 - 查询状态、修改端口、重启、验证、安全创建和删除，支持三重确认和自动备份。仅限 macOS。

message.en: This skill requires macOS. It uses LaunchAgent, launchctl, and plutil which are macOS-specific.
message.zh: 此技能需要 macOS 系统。使用了 LaunchAgent、launchctl 和 plutil 等 macOS 特有命令。

message.en: Delete operation uses rm -rf with triple confirmation and automatic backup. Use with caution.
message.zh: 删除操作使用 rm -rf，有三重确认和自动备份。请谨慎使用。

message.en: Requires jq (brew install jq), node, and OpenClaw installed. Run check-dependencies.sh to verify.
message.zh: 需要 jq (brew install jq)、node 和 OpenClaw。运行 check-dependencies.sh 验证。

usage.zh: 运行 ~/.jvs/.openclaw/skills/gateway-manager/scripts/gateway-status.sh 查看网关状态

en: 🔍 Smart gateway status query with port identification
🗑️ Safe deletion with triple confirmation and automatic backup
➕ One-click instance creation with LaunchAgent setup
📡 Intelligent port scanning for all OpenClaw instances
zh: 🔍 智能网关状态查询，自动识别端口
🗑️ 安全删除功能，三重确认 + 自动备份
➕ 一键创建实例，自动配置 LaunchAgent
📡 智能端口扫描，识别所有 OpenClaw 实例
